topic: Langflow vs n8n vs Flowise vs Dify: Full 4-Way AI Builder Comparison 2026
keyword: Langflow vs n8n vs Flowise vs Dify 2026

key_points: Dify wins for production LLM-powered SaaS with multiple teams and long-lived projects
Langflow wins when team already runs LangChain/LangGraph in production
Flowise wins for fastest path to chatbot-with-RAG without writing code
Dify has full LLM-app platform: backend, database, admin UI, API gateway, prompt management
Flowise simpler and lighter — runs on 1 GB RAM vs Dify's 4 GB minimum
Dify has 90K+ GitHub stars; Langflow ~146K GitHub stars; Flowise ~42K-51K GitHub stars
Dify debugging is best-in-class: shows execution time, input/output, token usage per node
Langflow processes complex RAG workflows faster than Flowise on large documents
Dify treats every flow as an API endpoint by default with auth and rate limiting
Dify supports 100+ LLM models; Langflow via LangChain ecosystem; Flowise via LangChain.js
n8n has 182,760 GitHub stars vs Flowise 51,614 — 3.5x more community adoption
n8n has 400+ integrations vs Flowise's AI-focused node library
Flowise built for LLM chains, agents, RAG pipelines; n8n built for business workflow automation
Many teams use Flowise as the AI brain inside n8n workflows — complementary architecture
n8n Cloud from €24/month; Flowise Cloud from $35/month
Langflow is Python-native — critical advantage for data science teams vs Flowise's JS-based approach
Langflow supports 15+ vector stores, multiple re-ranking strategies, hybrid search
Langflow LangGraph integration means teams won't outgrow it as fast
n8n is most complete AI low-code tool as of March 2026: 400+ native nodes plus AI agents, RAG, tool calling
n8n is undisputed king for AI agents that interact with real world: email, DB updates, Slack notifications
Flowise is fastest way to have functional RAG chatbot without coding — deployable in 15 minutes
Langflow wins for advanced RAG with visual debugging of pipelines
Recommended architecture: use n8n for Ops, Flowise for Bots, Langflow for AI Logic
Dify offers best team management with SSO, RBAC, audit logs in enterprise plan

stats.fact: n8n has 182,760+ GitHub stars as of April 2026, making it the most starred workflow automation tool — 3.5x more than Flowise
Langflow has ~146,000 GitHub stars as of early 2026, compared to Flowise's ~51,000 and Dify's 90,000+
Flowise GitHub stars grew from 25K to 42,000+ by 2026 with 24,000+ forks and 300+ contributors
Dify raised $30M Series Pre-A funding and supports 100+ LLM models across all major providers
Flowise minimum system requirements: 1 GB RAM; Dify requires minimum 4 GB RAM for self-hosted deployment
n8n supports 400+ pre-built integrations; Flowise focuses on AI/LLM nodes; Dify has 100+ LLM model connectors
Pricing in 2026: n8n Cloud from €24/month, Flowise Cloud from $35/month (Starter), Dify Professional $59/month, Langflow free open source (self-host $5-$20/month on Railway)
Flowise can be deployed and have a functional RAG chatbot running in under 15 minutes — fastest time-to-prototype of all four tools
40% of enterprise applications will include task-specific AI agents by end of 2026, up from less than 5% in 2025
Langflow was acquired by DataStax and reached 100k GitHub stars milestone in August 2025, with 1.2M monthly PyPI downloads

angles: The definitive 4-way matrix: which tool wins for RAG, multi-agent, business automation, and team collaboration — each tool has one domain it dominates
Architecture layers: n8n is the orchestration engine, Flowise is the chatbot layer, Langflow is the AI logic layer, Dify is the full application platform — they're not competing but complementary
The 15-minute test: deploy a RAG chatbot on each tool in 15 minutes — Flowise wins, Dify finishes second, Langflow third, n8n last — but that's not the right metric for production
JavaScript vs Python: the hidden language war that actually determines which tool fits your stack (Flowise=JS, Langflow=Python, Dify=Python, n8n=JS/TS)
Resource constraints matter: Flowise on 1GB RAM, n8n light, Langflow medium, Dify needs 4GB — critical for self-hosted cost calculation
The enterprise checklist: SSO, RBAC, audit logs, multi-workspace — how each tool stacks up for enterprise procurement
keywords: Langflow vs n8n vs Flowise vs Dify
